name: exedus__xen_beside_sms
description: [Exedus (Xen core tools - 24 tools)] Send outbound SMS as Xen (from +17709999934) via Beside Android app on T608G. Uses the proven ADB UI-automation flow. Force-stops Beeper briefly to avoid foreground contention, navigates Beside compose, types body, taps Send, emits receipt. Blocks ~15-25s for the full flow.

existing_thread.description: Skip new-chat flow if you know the thread is already open on screen (rarely needed)
